# Terminal Operating Systems

Optimize mission critical operations with a TOS built to empower performance and profitability

[Learn More](https://kaleris.com/contact/)

[**Why Us?**](https://kaleris.com/solutions/terminal-operating-system/#why-us)

[**Overview**](https://kaleris.com/solutions/terminal-operating-system/#overview)

[**Customers**](https://kaleris.com/solutions/terminal-operating-system/#customer-experiences)

[**FAQS**](https://kaleris.com/solutions/terminal-operating-system/#faqs)

## Why leading terminals chooseKaleris

Gain the competitive edge with software that matches the complexities of your operation

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Make_Smarter__Moves_Arrow.svg)

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/blog-images-34.png)

#### Bridging Gaps in the Supply Chain

Connecting ports, terminals, distribution centers, and partners under one platform.

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/blog-images-33.png)

#### Predictive Insights and Execution

Measure terminal productivity KPIs with real-time data for container throughput and gate performance

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/blog-images-35.png)

#### Extend Your TOS Without Downtime

Improve compliance
and reporting to improve operational costs.

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/blog-images-36.png)

#### Your Path to Digitization

Improve operational safety whether you’re semi-automated or fully-automated.

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/blog-images-37.png)

#### Robust EDI and API Integration

Handles all major EDI for container cargo and support integrations with various systems via EVP.​

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/blog-images-38.png)

#### Reduce Revenue Leakage

Capture billable events (CBM, FRT/Revenue Tons etc), manage contracts and invoices.

## Empowering profitability & performance

For over 30 years, Kaleris terminal operating technology has been at the forefront of supply chain innovation, continuously evolving to meet the needs of terminal operators worldwide.

of the world’s total TEU traffic moves through Kaleris TOS solutions

0%

Marine terminals globally trust Kaleris TOS for mission-critical operations

## Innovative purpose-built solutions for any operation

#### N4 TOS designed for container terminals

The most advanced terminal operating system on the market. It offers various externalization & integration opportunities and advanced optimization modules.

[Learn more](https://kaleris.com/solutions/terminal-operating-system/container-terminals/)

#### GC TOS designed for general cargo terminals

Manage multi-cargo terminal operations including containers, bulk, break bulk, and project cargo, automobiles, trucks, semi-trailer trucks, trailers, and railroad cars.

[Learn more](https://kaleris.com/solutions/terminal-operating-system/mixed-cargo-terminals/)

#### Lightweight turnkey TOS for all types of cargo

A simple, cost-efficient TOS for container terminals. It is easier to deploy, flexible and has a quick time to value – replacing legacy TOS systems.

[Learn more](https://kaleris.com/solutions/terminal-operating-system/cloud-based-tos/)

## Move Faster. Handle More. Maximize ROI.

Halting operations for hours or days to perform a technology upgrade is unrealistic.

A flexible terminal operating software solution grows with you and adapts to your needs. That’s why Kaleris TOS offers stepwise implementation, empowering businesses to turn their terminal’s data into powerful performance insights.

### Advanced Optimization: What If Your Terminal Could Move More—Without Adding Equipment?

Most terminals don’t struggle with equipment capacity, they struggle with coordination. Without intelligent optimization, cranes, trucks, and yard operations operate in silos, limiting throughput and increasing cost.

[Explore](https://kaleris.com/advanced-optimization/)

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/blog-images-40-1024x576.png)

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/blog-images-41.png)

### Any size, cargo, and operation type

With over 560 live sites, terminals of all sizes and types are efficiently and cost-effectively managed.

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Rectangle_3.svg)

### Seamlessly adapt to market disruptions

Pivot quickly to changing market conditions and fluctuating volumes while maintaining customer service levels.

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Rectangle_3.svg)

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/blog-images-42.png)

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/blog-images-44.png)

### Continuous evolution through cutting-edge innovation

We proactively develop new capabilities for modern, secure solutions that grow with you.

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Rectangle_3.svg)

## Explore Customer Experiences

In today’s fast-paced supply chain industry, Kaleris helps businesses enhance connectivity and productivity.

[See more](https://kaleris.com/case-studies/)

## Visibility isn't enough to conquer today's supply chain complexities

## Define your new competitive edge with real-time data, resilience, and interoperability ​

Marine terminals today face intense pressure from shipping lines, shippers, and evolving global trade demands. The answer isn’t more complexity—it’s**smarter**, **connected** infrastructure.

The Kaleris Enterprise and Visibility Platform APIs empowers terminals to deliver faster, collaborate better, and operate more resiliently.

[Discover Better Execution and Visibility](https://kaleris.com/solutions/execution-visiblity-platform/)

## Kaleris equips terminals for success with seamless connectivity

![](https://kaleris.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/TOS-graphic-V2-2048x1421.png)

## FAQs

Are Kaleris solutions secure?

Our solutions are designed with enterprise-grade security to protect your data and ensure compliance with industry standards. Visit our [Compliance](https://kaleris.com/compliance/) page to learn more about how we’re ensuring safety protocols for our partners and customers.

[Compliance](https://kaleris.com/solutions/terminal-operating-system/#)

How quickly will I experience ROI with Kaleris TOS solutions?

Our digital platform automates the parts of your terminal that you care about most, regardless of the size or scale of your operation – the berth, the yard, and the gate.

- Keep a bead on terminal inventory
- Track vessel moments in real-time
- Improve yard utilization
- Reduce your carbon footprint
- Reduce demurrage and detention rates (including containers, trucks, rail, and cranes)
- Create digital reports to reduce scheduling errors
- Improve planning and decision-making support for vessel visits


[See More](https://kaleris.com/what-is-a-terminal-operating-system/)

How does Kaleris support its customers?

**Our customers are transforming their supply chains — and talking about it.**

From streamlining operations to cutting lead times in half, our clients are achieving serious results. And they’re not keeping it to themselves.

Kaleris supports our customers through sincere partnerships. From enabling customer events between key stakeholders, offering support across regions, and guiding our customers from setup to adoption. We’re with you, every step of the way

[Explore Partnerships](https://kaleris.com/solutions/terminal-operating-system/#)

How can I maximize the effectiveness of my TOS?

Kaleris EVP is helping terminals worldwide simplify, scale, and succeed by fostering connectivity between ports and terminals and improving communication between key stakeholders.

[Learn More](https://kaleris.com/solutions/execution-visiblity-platform/)

## Why Navis TOS?

Navis brought several customers together to discuss what the Navis TOS means to them and their terminals. Hear from Haifa Port, Hamburg Sud, Port Newark Container Terminal, Malta Freeports Limited, Modern Terminals Limited, YILPORT Holding Inc., Virginia International Terminals, and Cornelder de Mocambique about their experiences with N4.
